info.title: Central Memory Hub API
info.description: API for managing structured and unstructured data with vector embeddings in a Central Memory Hub

get.description: Health check endpoint for Custom GPT integration (does not require authentication)

status.description: Overall health status (healthy, degraded, or error)

time.description: ISO timestamp of the health check

post.description: Health check endpoint for Custom GPT integration (POST method, does not require authentication)

status.description: Overall health status (healthy, degraded, or error)

Timestamp when the context was created

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent session

ended_at.description: When the session ended (null if ongoing)

current_focus.description: What the agent is currently focusing on (e.g., spec review)

receiver_agent.description: Agent that received the message (null for user-facing messages)

message_type.description: Type of message (instruction, status_update, handoff, question)

session_id.description: ID of the session this message belongs to

entity_id.description: Unique identifier for the organizational state entity

entity.description: Name of the entity (e.g., Project X, Client Y)

last_updated_by.description: Agent that last updated this entity

updated_at.description: When the entity was last updated

priority.description: Priority of the task (higher numbers are higher priority)

linked_project.description: Project this task is linked to

updated_at.description: When the task was last updated

reversal_possible.description: Whether this decision can be reversed

index_id.description: Unique identifier for the knowledge entry

last_verified.description: When this term was last verified

updated_at.description: When this entry was last updated

link_id.description: Unique identifier for the memory link

pinecone_vector_id.description: ID of the vector in Pinecone/unstructured data

linked_agent_event.description: Agent event linked to this memory

content.description: Content from the linked unstructured data

updated_at.description: When this experiment was last updated

insight_id.description: Unique identifier for the user insight

related_agent_or_project.description: Agent or project related to this insight

tone_tag.description: Tone of the interaction (frustrated, in flow, curious)

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-KEY
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key must be provided in the X-API-KEY header for all endpoints except /sys/health. You can get an API key from the application's API Keys page.
